jobline.lineDescription: Size: 35mm x 90mm||Material: PP60 - Permanent||Print Colour: 6 Colour||Tool: D0253(10,6)(0,1)0.6mm Rectangle||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE LAMINATE||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: MOD 200mm, Right Edge Leading||Qty: 42,000||||||Reject Shop 50mL Oils Eucalyptus PANTONE 624 C x 3000||Reject Shop 50mL Oils Peppermint PANTONE 333 C x 6000 ||Reject Shop 50mL Oils Lavender PANTONE 2087 C x 2000 ||Reject Shop 50mL Oils Lemongrass PANTONE 2298 C x 6000 ||Reject Shop 50mL Oils Rose PANTONE 7431 C x 4000 ||Reject Shop 50mL Oils Sandalwood PANTONE 2171 C x 5000||||Radiance 50mL Fragrant Oil Coconut Mango x 2000||Radiance 50mL Fragrant Oil Fresh Linen x 2000||Radiance 50mL Fragrant Oil Lavender x 2000||Radiance 50mL Fragrant Oil Lemongrass x 2000||Radiance 50mL Fragrant Oil Rose x 1000||Radiance 50mL Fragrant Oil Sandalwood x 2000||Radiance 50mL Fragrant Oil Vanilla x 2000||||||||Indulge 50mL Fragrant Oil Rose x 1000||
